# test: # Static exclusions for the concurrency suite.
# These are concurrency/fsstress-adjacent cases we deliberately leave out
# because they depend on features Asterinas ext4 does not (yet) support.

reason: fsstress + extended attributes; attrs/xattr not in scope
serial fsstress + extended attributes; attrs/xattr not in scope
fsstress + quota accounting; quota not supported
fsstress + quota limits; quota not supported
fsstress + ENOSPC + quota + attrs; quota/attrs not supported
fsstress + dm-error injected disk failure; Asterinas has no device-mapper (covered by custom ext4_crash scenarios)
